name: repo_create_and_index

candidates.content: func (s *AnswerService) Ask(ctx context.Context, repositoryID uint, question string) (*AskResponse, error) { citations, err := s.retriever.Search(ctx, repositoryID, question, nil); return &AskResponse{Citations: citations}, err }

func (s *IngestService) CreateAndIndex(ctx context.Context, repoURL string) (*model.Repository, error) { ref, err := s.fetcher.Parse(repoURL); repo.Status = "pending"; go s.index(context.Background(), repo.ID, ref); return &repo, nil }

func (f *GitHubFetcher) Parse(raw string) (GitHubRepoRef, error) { parsed, err := url.Parse(strings.TrimSpace(raw)); parts := strings.Split(strings.Trim(parsed.Path, "/"), "/"); return GitHubRepoRef{Owner: parts[0], Name: name}, nil }

name: repo_background_index

func (s *IngestService) index(ctx context.Context, repoID uint, ref GitHubRepoRef) { s.updateStatus(ctx, repoID, "indexing", ""); zipPath, err := s.fetcher.DownloadZip(ctx, ref, workDir); util.Unzip(zipPath, sourceDir); stats, err := s.indexer.IndexRepository(ctx, &repo, sourceDir); s.updateReady(ctx, repoID, stats) }

func (i *CodeIndexer) IndexRepository(ctx context.Context, repo *model.Repository, root string) (IndexStats, error) { files, err := util.ScanSourceFiles(root); chunks := ChunkSourceFile(file, i.cfg.ChunkMaxLines, i.cfg.ChunkOverlapLines); vectors, err := i.embedder.EmbedBatch(ctx, texts); tx.Create(&records); return IndexStats{}, nil }

name: go_ast_chunking
question: Go 文件是怎么通过 AST 分片的？

candidates.content: func callLLM(ctx context.Context, cfg config.Config, system, user string) (string, error) { req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodPost, endpoint, bytes.NewReader(body)); json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&decoded); return content, nil }

func ChunkSourceFile(file util.SourceFile, maxLines, overlap int) []Chunk { if strings.EqualFold(filepath.Ext(file.Path), ".go") { chunks := chunkGoFile(file, maxLines); if len(chunks) > 0 { return chunks } }; return ChunkContent(file.Content, maxLines, overlap) }

func chunkGoFile(file util.SourceFile, maxLines int) []Chunk { fset := token.NewFileSet(); parsed, err := parser.ParseFile(fset, file.Path, file.Content, parser.ParseComments); for _, decl := range parsed.Decls { switch d := decl.(type) { case *ast.FuncDecl: chunks = append(chunks, goNodeChunk(...)); case *ast.GenDecl: } }; return chunks }

name: line_number_mapping
question: goNodeChunk 里 fset 怎么把 AST 位置转换成行号？

candidates.content: func goNodeChunk(fset *token.FileSet, lines []string, startPos, endPos token.Pos, symbolName, symbolType string, maxLines int) []Chunk { start := fset.Position(startPos).Line; end := fset.Position(endPos).Line; text := strings.TrimSpace(strings.Join(lines[start-1:end], "\n")); return []Chunk{{StartLine: start, EndLine: end, Content: text}} }
func chunkEmbeddingText(path string, chunk Chunk) string { b.WriteString("path: "); b.WriteString(path); b.WriteString(chunk.Content); return b.String() }

for start := 0; start < len(inputs); start += batchSize { batch := inputs[start:end]; texts := make([]string, len(batch)); vectors, err := i.embedder.EmbedBatch(ctx, texts); for idx, input := range batch { record.EmbeddingVector = VectorLiteral(vectors[idx]) } }

func (e *Embedder) EmbedBatch(ctx context.Context, texts []string) ([][]float64, error) { if e.cfg.EmbeddingProvider == "remote" { return e.embedRemoteBatch(ctx, texts) }; vectors := make([][]float64, len(texts)); return vectors, nil }

name: vector_literal
question: VectorLiteral 是怎么把向量写入 pgvector 查询的？

candidates.content: func (r *Retriever) Search(ctx context.Context, repositoryID uint, query string, hints []string) ([]Citation, error) { embedding, err := r.embedder.Embed(ctx, expandedQuery); vector := VectorLiteral(embedding); rows, err := r.vectorSearch(ctx, repositoryID, vector, limit); return rows, err }

func VectorLiteral(vector []float64) string { parts := make([]string, len(vector)); for i, value := range vector { parts[i] = fmt.Sprintf("%.6f", value) }; return "[" + strings.Join(parts, ",") + "]" }

func (r *Retriever) keywordSearch(ctx context.Context, repositoryID uint, features searchFeatures, limit int) ([]Citation, error) { lower(file_path) LIKE ? OR lower(symbol_name) LIKE ? OR lower(content) LIKE ? }

func boost(rows []Citation, query string, hints []string) { if symbolName != "" && strings.Contains(queryLower, symbolName) { bonus += 0.30 }; if filePath == path || strings.HasSuffix(filePath, path) { bonus += 0.24 }; rows[i].Score += bonus }

name: diff_impact_analysis
question: git diff 变更影响分析是怎么判断影响模块的？

candidates.content: func (s *AnswerService) Ask(ctx context.Context, repositoryID uint, question string) (*AskResponse, error) { citations, err := s.retriever.Search(ctx, repositoryID, question, nil); return &AskResponse{Citations: citations}, err }

func (s *ImpactService) Analyze(ctx context.Context, repositoryID uint, diffText string) (*ImpactResponse, error) { hints := util.ExtractDiffHints(diffText); citations, err := s.retriever.Search(ctx, repositoryID, diffText, hints); resp := localImpact(diffText, citations); return resp, nil }

func localImpact(diffText string, citations []Citation) *ImpactResponse { changedPaths := util.ExtractDiffPaths(diffText); matchedPaths, unmatchedPaths := matchDiffPaths(changedPaths, citations); modules := uniquePaths(matchedCitations, 5); return &ImpactResponse{ImpactedModules: modules} }

func (s *IngestService) Get(ctx context.Context, id uint) (*model.Repository, error) { if repo, ok := s.getRepoCache(ctx, id); ok { return repo, nil }; var repo model.Repository; s.db.WithContext(ctx).First(&repo, id); s.setRepoCache(ctx, &repo); return &repo, nil }

func (s *IngestService) getRepoCache(ctx context.Context, id uint) (*model.Repository, bool) { data, err := s.rdb.Get(ctx, repoCacheKey(id)).Bytes(); json.Unmarshal(data, &repo); return &repo, true } func (s *IngestService) setRepoCache(ctx context.Context, repo *model.Repository) { s.rdb.Set(ctx, repoCacheKey(repo.ID), data, s.cfg.RepoCacheTTL) }

candidates.content: func Load() Config { return Config{GitHubProxyURL: strings.TrimRight(getenv("GITHUB_PROXY_URL", ""), "/")} }
func (f *GitHubFetcher) downloadURL(rawURL string) string { if f.cfg.GitHubProxyURL == "" { return rawURL }; return f.cfg.GitHubProxyURL + "/" + rawURL }

name: llm_call
question: callLLM 函数是怎么调用大模型接口的？

candidates.content: func (e *Embedder) embedRemoteBatch(ctx context.Context, texts []string) ([][]float64, error) { endpoint := strings.TrimRight(e.cfg.OpenAIBaseURL, "/") + "/embeddings"; req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+e.cfg.OpenAIAPIKey); resp, err := e.client.Do(req) }

func callLLM(ctx context.Context, cfg config.Config, system, user string) (string, error) { body, err := json.Marshal(chatRequest{Model: cfg.OpenAIModel, Messages: []chatMessage{{Role: "system", Content: system}, {Role: "user", Content: user}}}); endpoint := strings.TrimRight(cfg.OpenAIBaseURL, "/") + "/chat/completions"; req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+cfg.OpenAIAPIKey); resp, err := client.Do(req); json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&decoded); return strings.TrimSpace(decoded.Choices[0].Message.Content), nil }

name: ask_citation_prompt

candidates.content: func impactUserPrompt(diffText string, citations []Citation, matchedPaths, unmatchedPaths []string) string { b.WriteString("代码变更 diff："); b.WriteString(diffText); b.WriteString("相关代码片段："); return b.String() }

func (s *AnswerService) Ask(ctx context.Context, repositoryID uint, question string) (*AskResponse, error) { citations, err := s.retriever.Search(ctx, repositoryID, question, nil); answer := s.localAnswer(question, citations); generated, err := callLLM(ctx, s.cfg, codeAnswerSystemPrompt(), codeAnswerUserPrompt(question, citations)); return &AskResponse{Answer: answer, Citations: citations}, nil }

func codeAnswerUserPrompt(question string, citations []Citation) string { b.WriteString("用户问题："); b.WriteString(question); b.WriteString("相关代码片段："); for i, c := range promptCitations(citations) { b.WriteString(c.FilePath); b.WriteString(c.Content) }; return b.String() }
